visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young Asian women stand in the center of a wide warehouse store aisle. The woman on the left has long black hair tucked under a black beanie, wearing a brown mesh top and ripped jeans; her face shows a neutral to pleasant expression as she holds the left side of a large blue puzzle box. The woman on the right wears a patterned bucket hat and a white ruffled off-shoulder top, smiling directly at the camera while holding the right side of the box. The box is a 'Toy Story 30 Years & Beyond' multi-pack with colorful character art. The background is filled with tall industrial metal shelves stacked with cardboard boxes under bright, cool-toned overhead fluorescent lighting. (2) The women continue to hold the puzzle box, which is the central focus. The woman on the right gestures with her right hand towards the product while speaking, her facial expressions are animated and energetic. Several yellow and red variety-style text boxes with traditional Chinese characters pop up around the screen to emphasize their points. Behind them, the warehouse setting shows a deep perspective with pallets of goods and other store sections visible in the distance. The camera maintains a medium-shot framing, capturing their upper bodies and the large product box clearly. (3) The camera cuts to a tighter shot focusing on the individual puzzle tins inside the box. Hands reach in to point at specific tins featuring Toy Story characters like Slinky Dog and Mr. Potato Head, showcasing the variety of designs. The scene then transitions back to the original medium shot where both women are visible again. They both raise their thumbs in a 'thumbs up' gesture towards the camera, smiling broadly. The lighting remains bright and consistent, highlighting the glossy surface of the product and the textures of their clothing against the cluttered but organized warehouse background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 迪士尼有史以來最便宜又可愛的拼圖來了. [Variety]: 迪士尼有史以來. (2) [Subtitle]: 他這是30週年的拼圖. 635元裡面有20入. 每一盒拼圖是24~50片. 每一盒等於31塊錢. [Variety]: 超划算. (3) [Subtitle]: 很划算 比送糖果還便宜. 如果你是補習班老師啊. 或者是你有生20個小孩的. 你就買回去給大家一人抽一盒. 你也可以拿去給你的小朋友分班上抽. 現在少子化 班上應該只有20個. 對啊 這個拿來生日送禮也好棒. 對啊 你看圖案都做得好可愛. (4) [Subtitle]: 小豬 狗狗 然後 蛋頭先生. 我覺得這圖片很誠意耶. 最重要是 它是鐵盒. 所以你拼圖拼完了. 你裡面也可以裝一些糖果啊或餅乾之類的. 好推薦. [Variety]: 鐵盒.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two female content creators are featured throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young women; one with a black beanie and brown top, another with a bucket hat and white ruffled top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background is an industrial warehouse setting with high ceilings, tall metal shelving units, and various cardboard boxes stacked on pallets.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice speaks rapidly in Traditional Chinese with a cheerful, energetic tone. The speech rate is fast, with few pauses. Simultaneously, an upbeat electronic pop background music track begins at a moderate tempo of approximately 120 BPM, featuring bright synthesizer chords and a steady 4/4 beat. A faint background ambient noise of a large indoor space, suggesting a warehouse or supermarket environment with a low-frequency hum, is audible beneath the primary vocal and music layers. (2) The first speaker continues her enthusiastic narration, with her voice rising in pitch as she mentions specific prices and quantities. A second female voice briefly chimes in with short, agreeable interjections. The music maintains its energetic flow without interruption. Minimal incidental noises are heard, such as the faint sound of paper or cardboard movement as the product box is adjusted. The acoustics are clear, with a slight room resonance typical of a large open-plan building, but the vocal track remains front and center in the mix. (3) The primary female speaker's voice becomes more emphatic and slightly louder when describing the 'tin box' material, exhibiting high arousal. The background music continues at the same intensity, providing a consistent rhythmic backdrop. A few short, stylized pop sound effects are inserted to match the visual text overlays appearing on screen. The narration concludes with a friendly, inviting tone, followed by the music maintaining its beat until a clean hard cut ends the recording. The overall spectral balance is bright, emphasizing the clarity of the high-frequency vocal components.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Feature Breakdown -> Pricing Analysis -> Use-case Suggestion -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific Disney puzzle collection found at Costco by highlighting its affordability, cute design, and value for money, targeting parents or teachers looking for gifts.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of the Costco logo and detailed pricing information combined with a strong positive recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media product review with consistent branding and informative subtitles.
